name: Buttermilk Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix well until fully incorporated.
3. Cover and chill for at least 4 hours to allow flavors to develop.
4. The dressing will keep in the refrigerator for 2-3 weeks.
5. Adjust quantities as needed (halve or double) without changing other instructions.
